title: Much More Recipes
description:
Adds some recipes
also u can get creative powers for 10 seconds
body:
Adds much more recipes including but not limited to 
Bedrock, Command Blocks, Creative Powers, All Of The Ores, Trident and Nametag
I wont add any other things that get suggested since the mod is made for me and my friend but since its a "MoreRecipes" mod i uploaded it to modrinth. 
Also the mod is made in mcreator so it might have problems.
